programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Farage

programme.title: United Voices
programme.desc: As work in the UK gets more precarious and the gig economy booms, trade unionism is being reimagined and people from a wide range of backgrounds are joining new kinds of unions, often for the first time. Before coronavirus hit the UK and impacted the healthcare system, grassroots union United Voices of the World was already fighting for the rights of key workers.

programme.title: Burned to the Ground: the Canadian village incinerated by record temperatures
programme.desc: The small village of Lytton in British Columbia hit the global media when it smashed Canada's highest temperature record in June 2021, at 49.6C. Two days later, a wildfire burned the entire village to the ground. In the ashes of their homes, this cohesive but diverse community, which includes a majority of First Nations people, had to confront the realities of climate displacement by being relocated away from their ancestral lands. Through the stories of three residents we find a community searching for answers while relying on a collective spirit to heal

programme.title: Desert Fire
programme.desc: Football's world cup for unrecognised territories is viewed through the eyes of the manager and players of one of the most fascinating teams, Iraqi Kurdistan.

programme.title: On the road
programme.desc: Hundreds of women operate as sex workers along the Strada Bonifica, the ironically named ‘road of love' on the Adriatic coast of Italy. There has been a huge increase in the number of Nigerian women working along the 10-mile stretch of road – some of whom have been trafficked into the country and forced into prostitution. The film moves between the women's stories, the Italians who live and work there and the local NGO, named On the Road, attempting to support the women

programme.title: I am Alena | Trans actors
programme.desc: There's nothing here for me': transgender and trapped living a half-life in the deep south | Trans actors: 'Why can't you just represent me as a person?'

programme.title: Happy birthday
programme.desc: For years, global music publisher Warner/Chappell claimed copyright of the Happy Birthday song, demanding payment for any public performance of it. Jenn Nelson tells the story of her four-year campaign to prove that the company did not in fact own the rights to the world-famous song, whose tune was composed by two sisters in Kentucky in 1893. A judge's decision on 30 June to approve a $14m settlement means the song is now in the public domain

programme.title: The Hour of Lynching
programme.desc: Rakbar, a Muslim dairy farmer, was murdered by a Hindu mob who thought he was taking a cow to be slaughtered for meat. His wife, Asmeena, must undergo an intense iddat (mourning in purdah) and their daughter, Sahila, is forced to abandon school to take care of the household. While the family falls apart, the hate machinery of rightwing Hindu nationalists – politicians and lynch mobs – works overtime to legitimise the killing.

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: Black Pete | Comedy theatre about life in the Calais refugee camp
programme.desc: Black Pete: Why is the Dutch blackface tradition still going strong? | I don't want any more sadness in my life - comedy theatre about life in the Calais refugee camp

programme.title: No ball games: life and play through the eyes of children across the UK
programme.desc: Celebrating the imagination and resourcefulness of young children across the UK by understanding the outdoor games they invent, inherit and play. The documentary was shot before Covid-19 changed their lives, and shifts from rural Wales to post-industrial Teesside and inner-city London. What challenges will these young people face in the aftermath of brutal funding cuts to youth services? How can their optimistic energy strengthen their resilience in these challenging times?

programme.title: Obsessive compulsive cleaners: Episode 5

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: Lancashire is the location today as artist Debbie shows off her Victorian home with its shabby chic influenced interior. Farmer's daughter Jane puts her country chic inspired property in the limelight, while DIY lover Marjorie offers the guests a tour of her converted old bakery. Party loving Suzanne aims to wow the others with her Victorian manor complete with a croquet lawn.

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire today, Patricia who runs a vehicle recovery company shows off her modern eco efficient home with a Caribbean twist. Pop artist Josh opens up his end-terrace home which he has renovated himself, while spa centre owner Graham lives and works in his detached property complete with a floatation tank. Retiree Gill shows us around her Victorian townhouse filled with memorabilia from her travels.

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: Four homeowners in Cornwall play open house. Lee from Polperro has a model of the village in his back garden, while sales rep Michelle loves her country cottage which she shares with dogs Bailey and Minnie. Artist Anthea has a 1930s semi-detached house, and the final stop is metal specialist Tony Gosling's 17th-century townhouse which he shares with his family and Coral the cockatoo.

programme.title: Million Pound Movers: Million Pound Movers
programme.desc: With the number of millionaire homeowners rising, the high-end removals industry in the UK is booming. Moving house is said to be one of the most stressful life events, and for those blessed with the finer things in life, the stakes are even higher. Million Pound Movers goes behind closed doors to meet the wealthy clients moving priceless objects, plus the firms tasked with completing the job where one mistake could cost thousands. For these moving firms, demanding clients, unusual requests, and expensive art and furniture all make for a high-risk, yet entertaining business.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode 9, Lap of Luxury takes us to Fiordland Lodge, where the fiords and sounds' majestic beauty is on show. Heading north of Auckland, we experience paradise on your own private beach and lovingly thought out gardens at The Potting Shed. Then its avant-garde design meets rural bliss near Melbourne at the ultra-modern Jackalope. Step inside the Lap of Luxury and meet the wonderful and passionate people who are the heart and soul of these exquisite properties and experiences.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode ten, Lap of Luxury heads to Auckland's Waiheke Island where love reigns supreme amongst the beauty of Mudbrick. Then it's off to the South Island for some bespoke adventure in GCH Aviations' luxury jet, before heading to the isolated beauty of Australia's Lord Howe Island and Arajilla Retreat.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: With two growing children, Charlene and Granville are desperate to sell their two-bedroom Victorian terrace in Forest Gate, East London, and upgrade to a larger home… But after eight months, no offers, and a £50,000 price cut, they're running out of steam. While the property has loads of potential, its crammed interiors, tired décor, drab master bedroom, and scuffed walls are proving a major turnoff. And, with no ‘for sale' sign out front, and their agent on the other side of town, the listing is completely off the radar.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: Diane wants to move on from her recent break-up, but after eight months and a dozen viewings, her charming country cottage in Sittingbourne, Kent, hasn't attracted a single offer. The 1.2-acre property features a pastoral setting with six stables and a three-bedroom home… But the ramshackle interiors also come with broken doors, exposed cables, and reams of unfinished DIY jobs. Slashing the price hasn't made any difference at all. And to make matters worse, Diane has been doing the viewings herself.

programme.title: Posh Pawn: Episode 7
programme.desc: In this episode, high-end pawnbroker James enjoys a tipple from an unusual fire engine bar, memorabilia expert Lawrence is presented with an autograph collection that could be worth 20,000 pounds, and a former model wants sell some designer bags to finance the renovation of her house and her body.

programme.title: Travels with Darley

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.sub-title: Bordeaux, France Markets & Villages" Bordeaux, France Markets & Villages
programme.desc: World-class wine, medieval villages, museums and markets, the Bordeaux region of France is truly a feast for the senses. Darley cruises rivers and explore villages to reveal history around every scenic turn.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: From Delaware's first settler to the du Pont mansions and a historic fort, Darley discovers American history in and around Wilmington. She shares where to get great local beer and dine at a James Beard Award-nominated restaurant.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Lyndal and Bruce discuss the Lodge's dishes and menu. Lyndal and Amanda meet some baboons and their babies alongside the road on the way to see the famous Baobab tree. Bruce visits the local butcher to see what meats are on offer for the lodge.

programme.title: City Breaks Innsbuck( Eng)
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that's alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Quest Bihar, India (ENG)
programme.desc: Bihar's rural heartland has a lot to offer the intrepid traveller. Alex meets Rajesh Ramjan, a politician, a cultural conservationist and a foodie, who shows her the beauty of Bihar's countryside and introduces her to some traditional Bihari dishes. From dahi-chura, the Bihari breakfast of champions to flavourful preparations of fresh local vegetables simmering on a traditional stove, Alex gets an understanding of the nourishing cuisine that fuels farmers to toil in the fields all day.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic Pilsen (ENG)
programme.desc: Pilsen boasts of a majestic Baroque town square and magnificent Gothic churches but to the world, it will always be known as the birthplace of the world's first and arguably best lager beer, Pilsner Urquell. Rohan Patoley takes the tour of the most famous brewery at the town that has been practicing the art of brewing beer over 700 years.

programme.title: Backpack Caesarea, Israel(Eng)
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Zodiac fountain and then Jaffa Port. She then explores National Park in Caesarea. Ending the episode as learns about Baha'i faith.

programme.title: Great World Hotels Dieswaene (ENG)

programme.title: Quest, Jorhat(Eng)
programme.desc: From chicken with bamboo shoots to a banana stem dish called Posola Musar Ali Khan, Alex learns to make some popular dishes of Assam.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic Karlovy Vary (ENG)
programme.desc: Legend has it that Karlovy Vary was founded by the Czech king and Roman emperor Charles IV, who discovered a unique spring here while hunting deer one evening. This historic spa town in Czech Republic is known for the healing power of its thermal springs. Rohan explores a few of them including the Freedom and Rusalka Springs and understands their significance to the town.

programme.title: Backpack Acre, Israel(Eng)

programme.title: Quest, Nagaland(Eng)

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic Cesky Krumlov (ENG)
programme.desc: Situated on the banks of the Vltava river, Český Krumlov is a fine example of a European medieval town. Rohan witnesses the Gothic, Renaissance and Baroque elements of the stunning State Castle, which dominates the city. He also finds out about the unconventional life and work of the world-famous painter, whose art was once inspired by this fairytale town in mysterious ways.

programme.title: Backpack Nazareth, Israel(Eng)

programme.title: Akhanaten and Nefertiti
programme.desc: Explore the mysterious Egyptian ruler Akhenaten in this documentary series. Overthrowing the old gods, the pharaoh built temples across the country in the name of Aton. Was Akhenaten a great revolutionary on Egypt's throne, or were their greater powers controlling his legacy? Generations to come dubbed Akhenaton "the criminal of Amarna", for what he accomplished in Egypt had seemed impossible. He overthrew the old gods and replaced them with one figure: Aton. He dedicated temples throughout the land to Aton, constructing a new home for the god. At the side of the king was Nefertiti, one of the most beautiful and mysterious women in antiquity. She supported her husband's faith and became, with him, one of the most important evangelists of the new god.

programme.title: Queen Margrethe Of Denmark: Her Private Life
programme.desc: The private life of the Queen of Denmark. In 2020, Queen Margrethe will celebrate her 80th birthday - an excellent opportunity to look back at Her Majesty's more unofficial side and explore her vast knowledge of art, culture and history.

programme.title: William and Kate: A Year On
programme.desc: On 29 April 2011, William and Catherine were married in a fairy tale wedding watched by more than two billion people and celebrated the whole world over.

programme.title: Royal Britain
programme.sub-title: An Aerial History of the Monarchy
programme.desc: A unique look at the history of the monarchy that will inform and entertain.

programme.title: British Royals & National Socialism
programme.desc: The film presents documents and footage proving the royal family's and leading British aristocrats' sympathy for National Socialism.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Great Divide
programme.desc: Harry and Meghan fled the royal family for a second chance at the private life they always wanted. But despite their escape the world kept on telling and retelling their story.

programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: Ball Pool
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to play inside the local play area, but he is not allowed to enter.

programme.title: Pizza Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean orders a takeaway pizza, but when it arrives, he feels let down by the size of it.

programme.title: The Photograph
programme.desc: The airport personnel refuses to let Mr. Bean take a flight due to his passport having no photo.

programme.title: Dancing Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to learn to dance to impress his girlfriend Irma.

programme.title: Bean Shopping
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is locked in a department store overnight having the time of his life.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew.

programme.title: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean stay in to take delivery of a new lounge chair.

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mr Bean dog-sits for Irma and while in the park comes across a professional dog-walker.

programme.title: The Big Stink
programme.desc: Mr Bean ends up in a farm slurry pit after racing a tractor.

programme.title: Birthday Bother
programme.desc: It's Irma's birthday. Bean buys a bargain-bin load of cards, and writes out two –one nice, one silly.

programme.title: Bed Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean breaks his bed using it as a trampoline. He tries to fix it, but he can't.

programme.title: Spa Day
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean drives her and Miss Wince to their booked spa retreat.

programme.title: Charity Bean
programme.desc: Bean is both cajoled by Irma and spurred by his own jealousy of the fund-raising super-star Declan.

programme.title: Bean Encore
programme.desc: The Great Eduardo, violinist supreme, is in town and Irma wants to go to the concert.

programme.title: Mobile Home
programme.desc: Miss Wince takes Mrs. Wicket off on holiday in her brand-new, swanky caravan and Bean is left behind.

programme.title: Haunted House
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to impress some kids in the park with his football skills.

programme.title: Eau De Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean accidentally spills all of Mrs. Wicket's new, expensive perfume on the floor.

programme.title: Running On Empty
programme.desc: Mr Bean is on his way to the seaside when the mini runs out of petrol.

programme.title: Bean Bug
programme.desc: Scrapper gives Bean fleas, and Bean is forced to call in the pest control person.

programme.title: Coffee Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is out shopping when it starts to rain.

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wakes up on a freezing cold winter's morning to discover that the boiler is broken.

programme.title: Scrapper Cleans Up
programme.desc: Irma wants a romantic break Bean doesn't. It's too expensive.

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Bean wants to avoid lunch with Irma's Mum, at all costs.

programme.title: Save That Tree
programme.desc: Bean is showing Irma his favourite tree when he discovers a tree surgeon getting ready to cut it down.

programme.title: For Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket is persuaded by a jaunty estate agent to put her house up for sale.

programme.title: Jumping Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to learn skateboarding but hurts himself on his first try.

programme.title: Cat Chaos
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing.

programme.title: Short Sheeped
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King, which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.

programme.title: The Grim Escape
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to save Logan from the Shadowkeep's dungeon, but the liberators soon become the prisoners in a nightmarish twist of fate.

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
programme.desc: So the final puzzle forces ninja to question the true meaning of the Green Ninja Prophecy. Solving the puzzles releases a new peril for the Ninja to face. Will memories of their greatest victories be enough to defeat it?

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Karoake and Music Special
programme.desc: LEGO Friends are having fun with Karaoke and music.

programme.title: Celebrating The Special Day
programme.desc: Here, the girls go on an adventurous balloon ride. Watch how much fun they have.

programme.title: Only One Can Remain
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.” On the island, Lloyd learns his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen. They meet the playfully deceitful ruler who tells them they are in a tournament where ‘Only one can remain'. When they are spoiled by their posh quarters, they are surprised to find the game is already afoot: Last person to find a Jade Blade is out. After an epic battle of elemental powers, Kai steals the last one from Karlof, who is kicked out of the tournament through a trap door leading to the unknown. Later that night, the Ninja go in search for Zane but come across an underground temple where Chen and his Anacondrai Worshippers steal Karlof's power. Is this a fighting tournament, or a ploy to steal everyone's power?

programme.title: Versus
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. In order to find Zane and get to the bottom of Chen's mysterious plot the Ninja need to stay in the tournament and get past the first round. Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. Meanwhile, new Titanium Ninja Zane is locked in a dungeon and has a nightmare about a ferocious Ice Dragon. Guided by the voice of Pixal, he embraces his new technology and escapes his cell, only to find Pixal hasn't fared as well. Though she has no body, he inputs her CPU into his, uniting the two. In an attempt to prevent Jay versus Cole, the Ninja enlist the Master of Mind to help, but are unable to prevent the inevitable. In a gladiator battle, Jay and Cole put aside their feud to throw the match --enraging Chen to send Cole down the mysterious trap door. Lastly, Nya sees Zane's beacon is working again and is on the hunt for them.

programme.title: Winds Of Change
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only to discover it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. After the Ninja save a small fishing village, Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain but Kai promises to watch over him. When Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm,Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. When the Ninja's powers mysteriously disappear, they return to the Tea Farm and are attacked by Lloyd, who is possessed by the spirit of Moro, the Master of Wind! After a harrowing escape on the Bounty, Wu tells the Ninja they weren't his first pupils!

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja – and the Ninja discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, leaving them to crash. When the dust settles, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja. They discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. In order to save Lloyd and get their powers back, they set off to find the first clue – the scroll to the lost martial art of ‘Airjitzu'. On their way to get it, they have a run in with one of Moro's ghost generals Wraythe, and discover water is the key to stopping them. Meanwhile, Nya discovers a family secret – her mother was a Water Ninja and with training, she could be one too.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: The Fortrex And The Furious
programme.desc: In a massive chase around Knighton, the NEXO-Knights attempt to keep the Book of Betrayal out of the Book of Monster's grip. But the evil book is persistent. Will he get the final piece of his evil puzzle? We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.” Suddenly, they realize Monsters – led by Magmar and the super-mad Book of Monster – are after them! Clay retreats with Jestro and the Book of Betrayal to rendezvous with the other Knights at the Fortrex. The Fortrex isn't fast enough they'll need their own vehicles. They decide that they need to split up and go in multiple directions to make the monsters expend their resources on a chase. It's a huge chase, being covered like a crazy news event by the Knighton News Network. We see a montage of the monsters stopping and capturing all the Knights vehicles: Aaron, Macy, Lance…finally Axl. However, as they do, they realize that the Knights have used Squirebots in Jestro Fan Jester hats (from the vendor at the comedy club in 108) as decoys. They think Axl has the Book of Betrayal in his BRICK containment unit, but it turns out to be the Ned Knightly Comic from episode 203. The Monsters finally corner Clay, who has the real Jestro and Book of Betrayal in his sword vehicle. Before Clay can protest, Jestro pushes the launch button and fires off Clay in the vehicle's rocket sword. The monsters race off with Jestro, leaving the shocked Clay fearing for his friend. Now, Magmar tells the Book of Monsters, they only need to get BOB. Clay makes his way back to the Fortrex and tells what has happened. They decide they must get to the Redoubt of Ruination in the Lava Lands and try to save Jestro. Meanwhile, we see, INTERCUT, a scene where Merlok 2.0 and the Book of Monsters explain the Books of Evil, how they were created and what the BOM will use them for. Merlok, back in the day, split the evil MONSTRUX into 10 magic books to keep him from ever being a threat. Only, he didn't destroy the books…and now the BOM has them and Monstrux can come back into the world! Meanwhile, the BOM has set up the huge, ceremonial arena at their HQ so they can have the ceremony to bring Monstrux back into the world. Jestro realizes he's been a pawn of the Book of Monsters. Jestro says he'll never get the Book of Betrayal…the Knights have it. In the last scene, we see Clay taking the Book of Betrayal from the Fortrex, climbing into his vehicle and driving towards…the Redoubt of Ruination! Has the Book of Betrayal worked its evil magic on him?!

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: Short Sheeped
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King, which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots discover Omega Supreme's energy signal on the Moon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron manipulates the impaired Optimus into joining the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime leads a strike team of Autobots on a mission deep into Decepticon territory.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus begins to rebel against Megatron's commands.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, as Kicker urges the Autobots to heed Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starved for energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The evil Decepticons have appeared in Detroit.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While working on a space bridge, the Autobots and their leader, Optimus Prime, find the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots continue to fight off Megatron and the evil Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: As the Decepticons are not responsible for the recent treachery, the Autobots want to find out who is it.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The evil five-faced Quintessons forge a dark alliance with the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Rodimus Prime seeks the true nature of the Quintessons and comes to a terrifying realization.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Great battles rage. Blurr and Wheelie must complete a desperate mission, or Earth will be lost.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When Bumblebee loses the ability to convert into vehicle mode, he begins to question his worth to the team.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Breakfast At Greedy's: This time, Gargamel feels sure of himself. Well, almost. He is going to try and finally catch the little Smurfs! Greedy Smurf's lighter-than-air pancakes are almost responsible for the Smurfs floating into Gargamel's grasp...

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Flighty's Plight: Flighty Smurf, as his name implies, can't make his own mind up about anything. The other Smurfs take him to the forest for a survival test in which he can find his way home only by making decisions. He ends up in Balthazar's castle.

programme.title: The Trojan Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil wizard, has devised a new plan to capture the Smurfs: he builds a giant statue in the shape of Papa Smurf. Thus, he hopes, the Smurfs are going to drag the statue into their Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa Smurf, Papa Smurf: Yes, there can be too much of a good thing. When an accident happens to Papa Smurf's magic formula and he ends up multiplied by two, the Smurfs are elated: two Papa Smurfs can give twice the good counsel and twice the loving that one can. But after a while, things get too complex in the Village. Especially when another accident doubles the number of Gargamels!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Family Album: The Smurflings admire Brainy when they see Papa's photo album. Then Gargamel steals Mother Nature's magic wands and captures the Village, and it's up to Brainy to save the day. Using Papa's magic pouch, Brainy returns the wands to Mother Nature further impressing the Smurflings.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Handy's Sweetheart: Handy learns it's better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: The Masked Pie-Smurfer
programme.desc: When tempers flare, the Smurfs hire a masked pie thrower to get revenge on other Smurfs. Everyone becomes even angrier as pies fly and no one knows who's doing it. When Jokey is unmasked as the culprit, Papa defends him. He says that if all the Smurfs shared their feelings, they wouldn't need a secret pie thrower.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Clumsy Smurfs The Future: What a strange stone Clumsy has unearthed! In it, he can see events that are going to happen... Yet knowing part of the future sometimes brings bad luck!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Waste Not, Smurf Not: Growing, harvesting and preparing food takes up much of the Smurfs' time. Handy invents a machine that farms and processes food. But this wonderful invention has its drawbacks...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Circus For Baby: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Master Smurf: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf The Other Cheek: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: The Horn Of Plenty
programme.desc: Mother Nature always does her best, but this time she's gone wrong. Her wand gets the wrong results and she accidentally damages the Autumn harvest. Now the Smurfs and all the forest animals face a lean and hungry winter. The only place where the Smurfs could get food would be the Land of Plenty. But Gargamel steals the famed Horn of Plenty to lure the Smurfs.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Scruple's Sweetheart
programme.desc: Brenda, the little witch, feels rejected: no-one is taking her to this year's Broomstick Ball. Oh, if she could find some nice-looking boy... Then she meets Scruple, apprentice of the evil wizard Gargamel. He's so handsome, and available too! What she does not know is that Scruple's only interest is her magic wand. What the Smurfs know is that they're going to save the day.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Alex Pascall and some children sing to their dolls to rock them to sleep. Laa-Laa wants to sing a lovely song, but Tinky Winky is crunching his Tubby Toast too loudly!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies line up to say 'Eh-oh' and then watch Matthew and Mark feed a baby calf. The Teletubbies play a game to see who can eat their Tubby Custard the slowest, but Po can't wait and eats her Tubby Custard very fast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a slide game before watching Becky and Jed look for eggs on their farm. Then their mum cooks them for their tea. In Teletubbyland, the Lion and Bear play their hide and seek game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are eating Tubby Toast. They play the game 'Two Little Teletubbies', but while they are playing the Noo-Noo tidies up their Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky says "Eh-oh". The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be the Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty hat. The Teletubbies are very happy when they find their favourite things to play with.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa run into Home Hill to say 'Eh-oh', but where 's Po? Some children help their dad to wash his car. They get very wet and soapy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Fish N Chips: Best Enemies Forever
programme.desc: Best enemies forever, Fish and Chips, an amazing fish and a fiendish cat, have a hate-hate relationship. Only one thing will bring this determined little goldfish and not so streetwise tom-cat together and it is the thing they have been battling for since birth: A bone! Handed down through generations, both believe this charm belongs to them, and neither will rest until they have it, prepared to do anything to get it! Starring the voices of John Leguizamo (Sid in Ice Age) and Mario Cantone (Surf's Up) this is the modern day Tom and Jerry that kids will love to love in this colourful and fun cat and fish chase!

programme.title: Monk Little Dog
programme.desc: Monk goes fishing Monk at the beach Monk goes skiing Monk plays tennis Monk at the skating rink Monk and the cursed toast Monk sends a postcard Monk is a jovial little dog who obstinately tries his best but always fails! When thins aren't working out for Monk, catastrophes follow. Things can get totally out of control real fast!

programme.title: Telmo And Tula, Little Cooks
programme.desc: Fruit Shapes | Fresh Pasta | Safety tips in the Kitchen Telmo & Tula is a very fun animated series in which children learn to cook the best breakfasts, sandwiches, salads and desserts in a safe and entertaining way. Telmo and Tula will teach children how fun it is to prepare delicious meals step by step.

programme.title: Winx Club: Power play
programme.desc: The Trix torment the Winx Club for being unable to find the power of the Dragon's Flame in Domino. The cadre and staff of Cloud Tower escape to Alfea.

programme.title: Boom & Reds
programme.desc: From episode 61 to 66 The Reds are tiny creatures who are part of a community that lives together in a tree belonging to a fantastic world. The Reds love to gather and draw pictures and in each chapter, the ogre Boom has to guess what the Reds are drawing on the ground.

programme.title: Monk Little Dog
programme.desc: Monk on mission impossible Monk, master of ceremonies Monk plays golf Monk plays video games Monk crashes a dinner party Monk, the movie star We've lost Monk Monk, the superhero Monk, Quack-Quack & Little Chick Monk investigates Monk is a jovial little dog who obstinately tries his best but always fails! When thins aren't working out for Monk, catastrophes follow. Things can get totally out of control real fast! Director/creator: Sungjae Kim, Natalys Raut Sieuzac, Suhoon Kim

programme.title: Boom & Reds
programme.desc: From episode 97 to 104 The Reds are tiny creatures who are part of a community that lives together in a tree belonging to a fantastic world. The Reds love to gather and draw pictures and in each chapter, the ogre Boom has to guess what the Reds are drawing on the ground.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf's growth potion is accidentally spilled on a Howlibird that grows into a giant creature. After much thought, Papa Smurf uses his anti-growth formula on the bird and soon it and the Smurf village return to normal.

programme.title: Telmo And Tula, Little Cooks
programme.desc: San Francisco | Vegetable Butterfly | Fruit Pudding Telmo & Tula is a very fun animated series in which children learn to cook the best breakfasts, sandwiches, salads and desserts in a safe and entertaining way. Telmo and Tula will teach children how fun it is to prepare delicious meals step by step.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: The faithful canine companion to the Duke of Dingwall, Hubert, inherits the Duke's estate and turns the world of high society upside down. With Hubert's new legal guardian being the Butler's niece, this unlikely duo have a hard time fitting into their new world. The Duke's conniving nephew believes the two to be a royal pain and will stop at no cost to steal the inheritance, even if it means marrying into the “Dukedome” via their pet poodle. A dog's tale of love and devotion that will have your family sitting up and begging for more!

programme.title: A Wizard's Tale
programme.desc: Imagine a world where happiness, smiling and laughter are a thing of the past where an evil wizard presides over all that is good in the land. A WIZARD'S TALE is a magical family adventure about one boy's quest to restore happiness to the world. Join Terry on his magical quest as he outwits a multitude of weird and wonderful creatures and finds friendship with a princess along the way. From the writer of Ice Age: The Meltdown and with a stellar voice cast, including Ian McShane (John Wick, Coraline), Lily Collins (Mirror Mirror) and Toby Kebbell (Ben-Hur, Warcraft), A WIZARD'S TALE is an uplifting magical journey that is guaranteed to cast its spell on adults and children alike.

programme.desc: By accident, the rabbids destroy the teleporta-TV.

programme.desc: A rabbid gets ejected from his rocket as it crashes, and takes the place of a guide dog.

programme.desc: Two rabbids play a bowling game using penguins as bowling pins.

programme.desc: Taking pity on a pack of frozen fish, the rabbids decide to set it free and embark on a risky mission.

programme.title: The Rabbids are part of the family.

programme.title: The Rabbids land at the North Pole.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E14
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E15
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E16
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E17
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E18
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E19
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E1
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E2
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E3
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E4
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E5
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E6
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E7
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E8
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E9
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E10
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E11
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

Then they are called for a mission to investigate strange occurrences in Dubai, involving buildings and other structures breaking down. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Om Nom Stories: Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors
programme.sub-title: Weather tricks (Episode 224) / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - Good Manners (Episode 225) / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - Clean Up! (Episode 226)
programme.desc: When the weather is unpredictable, Om Nom is predictably unprepared for it. This is when his friends and neighbours come to the rescue! Baby Angry had an umbrella for the whole company, and the weather machine took control of the weather ... until Om Nom played with it. Now he will have to find other ways to escape the rain! / Om Nom can be well-mannered even if he can't say 'Hello', 'Please', and 'Thank you'. It really is easy! A friendly smile and attention to the needs of neighbours and friends is all that he needs to have good manners. He is rewarded with beaming smiles and love all around. Helping friends is great! / When in good company or in a great mood, cleaning is fun! Armed with a mop, a brush, or a rug, Om Nom won't stop until everything is squeaky clean – and his friends will help! Baby Angry will once again show off her amazing strength, and Scientist-Nom will switch on her super boombox. Don't think twice, clean is nice!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories: Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors
programme.sub-title: Picnic (Episode 228) / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - The Party Quest / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - The Great Party Quest (Episode 247)
programme.desc: Om Nom goes on a series of picnics with his friends, and each picnic is special. Before unpacking the food, Handsome needs to preen, and Scientist Nom needs some impressive gadgets for a comfortable stay. Baby Angry brings something more capacious than a picnic basket, and Starra brings a smile to Om Nom's bouquet. And Nibble Nom saves Om Nom and Om Nelle from the last piece of the cake! / Om Nom understands that organizing a party is no small feat. To simplify things, he creates a well-prepared checklist of tasks he needs to accomplish. First on the list is setting the party mood - check! Next, he sends out invitations - check! And let's not forget the scrumptious carrot cake - check! However, Om Nom faces an unexpected obstacle when it comes to choosing the perfect music. Luckily, his loyal friends and neighbours step in to help. Finally, the moment arrives to rejoice and have an amazing time. Hooray, it's party time and everyone gathers to celebrate! / Om Nom gets frustrated waiting in line, so he tries to find ways to make things faster. But his shortcuts lead to unexpected problems. He ends up looking like a watermelon, trying to reach a yummy jar of jam, and even finds himself behind the cashier's counter. Luckily, a helpful friend always comes to his rescue. And just when you think the fun is over, Om Nom leads everyone to even more excitement!
